display_text: Void Spirit Aghanim's Scepter: Resonant Pulse silences enemies and gains 2 charges. This anti-magic upgrade counters spellcasters and teamfight disruptors by silencing key abilities, allowing Void Spirit to control engagements and interrupt enemy combos.
search_text: Void Spirit Aghanim Scepter anti-magic counter-spellcasters silence Resonant Pulse

display_text: Void Spirit Aghanim's Shard: Aether Remnant creates a rotating watcher path, provides True Sight, and deals damage to creeps instead of triggering on them. This anti-illusion and anti-invisibility upgrade transforms Void Spirit into a vision and crowd-control specialist, countering stealth heroes and clearing creep waves more efficiently.
search_text: Void Spirit Aghanim Shard anti-illusion anti-invisibility True Sight Aether Remnant
